target datalayout = "e-m:e-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: write)
declare void @llvm.assume(i1 noundef) #0

define void @sdiv_neg(ptr %p, i32 %arg) {
  %add = add i32 %arg, 17
  %cmp = icmp ult i32 %add, 6
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  %arg.nonneg = sub i32 0, %arg
  %div1.lhs.trunc = trunc i32 %arg.nonneg to i8
  %div12 = udiv i8 %div1.lhs.trunc, 6
  %div1.zext = zext i8 %div12 to i32
  %div1.neg = sub i32 0, %div1.zext
  store i32 %div1.neg, ptr %p, align 4
  ret void
}

issue.title: fraction `(a / b)` can be optimized under the condition that other fraction `(a / c)` implies
issue.author: k-arrows
